name: What's the time limit to file after chemical exposure at work?
description: 1 year in Utah/Idaho for workers' comp from knowledge of injury.[4]

mainEntity.name: What's the time limit to file after chemical exposure at work?

acceptedAnswer.text: 1 year in Utah/Idaho for workers' comp from knowledge of injury.[4]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Typically 1-3 years from injury awareness or diagnosis, varying by state—e.g., 1 year in Utah for workers' comp.** Statutes of limitations start from discovery of harm, crucial for latent illnesses like cancer.[4][7] Factors: exposure date vs. symptom onset, state laws (Idaho: 1 year). Check records immediately, as delays bar claims. Consult a specialist to confirm your deadline.
